jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.
freshAuditPolicy.completionAuditDetail: When the current checklist is completed, run a broad detailed audit like the 2026-05-30 manual review: backend/API, frontend/UI, permissions, production behavior, performance/data scale, tests, deployment, logs, navigation, accessibility, and real user journeys; update remediation-backlog.md before continuing.

lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next, vcontrolhub-ssh-ws, and caddy active; /api/status healthy; /scheduled-tasks and /templates returned 307, guarded automation APIs returned 401, /api/status returned 200; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: Record product requirement for operator-tunable runtime settings
lastRun.summary: Captured the product requirement that stability/UX knobs such as SSH terminal heartbeat/keepalive, command execution limits, SFTP sync timeouts, refresh intervals, and appropriate list limits should be configurable from an administrator settings surface rather than only hidden in environment variables.
validation: restored backlog/state from git after line-numbered read mistake
updated backlog with a new unchecked productization item
updated state next target; no runtime code changed
lastRun.nextTarget: Prioritize an admin Settings/API slice for operator-tunable runtime settings, then continue backlog-driven remediation.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified

productDirection: Favor exposing safe operational and UX tuning knobs in administrator settings instead of hard-coding or env-only configuration; keep secrets and truly infrastructure-only values env-only.
